summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for AiSteth FastAPI port. All 15 endpoints tested and verified against original Node/Express API specifications. 100% success rate (19/19 tests passed).
passed_tests: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns correct JSON shape
POST /api/save-assessment - Creates assessment with valid UUID
GET /api/assessments - Lists assessments sorted by created_at DESC, just-saved assessment is first
GET /api/assessments/{id} - Returns single assessment by ID
GET /api/assessments/patient/{patientId} - Filters assessments by patientId correctly
POST /api/snapshot - Creates snapshot with valid UUID
POST /api/snapshot - Returns 400 for missing fused field
GET /api/snapshots - Returns rows with face.samples as INTEGER count (not array)
GET /api/snapshots/{id} - Returns full doc with face.samples as ARRAY (900 items)
POST /api/logs - Creates log with valid UUID
POST /api/logs - Returns 400 for empty lines array
POST /api/logs - Returns 400 for missing lines field
GET /api/logs - Returns rows WITHOUT lines array
GET /api/logs/{id} - Returns row WITH lines array (3 items)
GET /api/stats - Returns all required fields (totalScans, totalAssessments, latestBpm=72, latestHrv, latestSpo2, latestBrpm, latestAt)
UUID and ISO datetime validation - All IDs are valid UUIDs, created_at is ISO string, no ObjectId leak
